name: Kimetsu No Yaba: Into the Infinity Castle
description:
Just watched the infinity castle movie again and it gave me this idea. Basically, User is in Douma's place, meaning they fight Shinobu instead of him. They DID kill Kanae, the reason is up to them.

More characters will be added in due time.
